game_info.title: Öoo: The Bomb Caterpillar
game_info.concept:
A Bomb Caterpillar's Big Adventure! "Öoo" is a charming yet mysterious exploration puzzle platformer where you discover creative ways to use bombs! Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2721890/oo/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ A Bomb Caterpillar's Big Adventure! "Öoo" is a charming yet mysterious exploration puzzle platformer where you discover creative ways to use bombs!

A Bomb Caterpillar's Big Adventure!

"Öoo" is a charming yet mysterious exploration puzzle platformer where you discover creative ways to use bombs!

A Variety of Solutions Using Bombs!

Discover unique ways to use bombs!

Uncover hidden paths with clever bomb usage!

Traverse the map to find hidden routes!

Features

  • A dense experience that can be enjoyed in just 2–3 hours

  • A cute yet oddly mysterious world

  • Diverse puzzle solutions that change depending on how you use bombs

  • No text — enjoy the game without language barriers

  • Cute enough to delight even those who don’t like bugs!
game_info.description: "Öoo: The Bomb Caterpillar" is a charming puzzle-platformer where you control Öoo, a mysterious caterpillar with explosive abilities. Navigate through a dark, bioluminescent underground world filled with obstacles. Use your ability to spawn bombs not just to destroy barriers, but to propel yourself across gaps using the force of explosions (bomb jumping). Collect glowing Star Spores for points and reach the Ancient Golden Leaf to win. Watch out for spikes and deep chasms!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move Öoo left and right
- Space: Jump
- Z: Spawn a bomb (Use for destruction or bomb-jumping)
- Shift: Hold to move slower (Precision mode)
- Enter: Start Game
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screens)
- Esc: Pause / Unpause

TEST_1.test_description: Verifies the complete winning path by simulating a player navigating the level, placing bombs at specific barriers, and reaching the goal.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The bot follows a predefined sequence of waypoints and actions (move, jump, place bomb, wait) corresponding to the level layout. It calculates distance to the next waypoint and executes the required inputs.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player character successfully navigates obstacles, destroys walls, collects items, reaches the Golden Leaf, and the game state changes to "GAME_OVER_WIN".

TEST_2.test_description: Stress tests the physics engine and collision system with random inputs.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot generates random inputs (move left/right, jump, place bomb) every few frames to simulate erratic behavior and check for stability.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game runs without crashing or throwing errors for a sustained period, even if the player dies or gets stuck.
